message:
feat(web): Add user suspension and ban workflow

- Add moderation action store for tracking warnings, suspensions, bans
- Add enforcement module for checking user access status
- Add /suspended page for users to see their suspension info
- Add /admin/users/[id]/moderate page for admin moderation actions

Features:
- Warnings, timed suspensions, indefinite suspensions, permanent bans
- Moderation reasons (spam, harassment, illegal content, etc.)
- Appeal workflow for suspended users
- Admin UI showing user history and stats
- Time remaining calculation for timed suspensions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
